jobs.purpose: Nightly sweep. Flips coupons past their valid_until timestamp to is_active=false + fires CouponExpired + releases the `coupon_slot` entitlement unit. Idempotent — refuses re-fire on already-inactive coupons.
steps: SELECT id FROM coupons WHERE is_active=true AND valid_until IS NOT NULL AND valid_until < now() AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 2000
For each: UPDATE coupons SET is_active=false + fire CouponExpired + fire CouponDeactivated with reason='expired_via_job'
Release 1 unit of `coupon_slot` entitlement per expired coupon
Emit stackra.coupon.expirations_total counter

jobs.purpose: Nightly. Recomputes coupon.usage_count from a COUNT(*) over coupon_redemptions filtered to reversed_at IS NULL, for each active coupon in the tenant. Defense against counter drift. Detects any drift > 0 as a P2 signal.
steps: For each active coupon: SELECT count(*) FROM coupon_redemptions WHERE coupon_id = ? AND reversed_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
Compare to coupons.usage_count
If drift != 0: UPDATE coupons SET usage_count = <recomputed> + emit stackra.coupon.usage_count.drift_ratio metric + notify observability with severity=warn
If usage_count hits usage_cap after reconciliation: fire CouponUsageCapReached + flip is_active=false + fire CouponDeactivated with reason='usage_cap_reached'

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by ProcessCouponClawbackOnInvoiceRefunded hook when finance::RefundIssued or finance::ChargebackFiled fires. Reverses every CouponRedemption tied (via applied_to) to the refunded invoice/transaction. Sets reversed_at + clawback_reason + decrements coupon.usage_count. Fires CouponClawbackCompleted per redemption.
steps: Load the triggering event (finance module payload provides invoice_id / transaction_id + refund_amount + refund_reason)
SELECT coupon_redemptions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND applied_to_type IN ('invoice','transaction') AND applied_to_id = ? AND reversed_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
For each redemption: fire CouponClawbackRequested + open a nested transaction
Under the transaction: UPDATE coupon_redemptions SET reversed_at=now(), clawback_reason=?, reversed_by_user_id=null (system cascade)
Under the same transaction: SELECT ... FOR UPDATE ON coupons + UPDATE coupons SET usage_count = usage_count - 1 (clamped to >= 0)
Fire CouponClawbackCompleted after commit
Metrics: stackra.coupon.clawbacks_total labelled by clawback_reason

jobs.purpose: Daily. Sends notification warnings at 14-day, 7-day, and 1-day windows before valid_until. Notifies the tenant admin + marketing role. Applies only to coupons with usage_count > 0 (unused coupons don't need warning).
steps: For each active coupon with valid_until IS NOT NULL AND usage_count > 0: compute days_until_expiry
If days_until_expiry IN (14, 7, 1): check if notification already sent for this coupon + window (idempotent via a per-window sent-flag in metadata)
If not yet sent: dispatch CouponExpiredNotification with window=days_until_expiry (informational — not the terminal CouponExpired event)
Update metadata.expiry_warnings_sent to record the window

jobs.purpose: Weekly. Generates per-tenant coupon usage report (coupons issued, redeemed, total discount cents, clawback count, top campaign codes, per-issuance_source breakdown). Stores CSV + JSON to S3 with a signed URL + fires CouponReportGenerated + optionally notifies opt-in admin/marketing.
steps: For each active tenant: compute the aggregate over the past 7 days from coupons + coupon_redemptions tables
Render CSV export to a tenant-scoped S3 prefix with 7-day-signed URL
Render JSON summary for inline display
Fire CouponReportGenerated with report_url + summary counters
Dispatch WeeklyCouponReportNotification to opt-in recipients
